opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is sharp and throbbing, and my ear feels completely blocked.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has got much worse over the last few hours and normal painkillers aren't touching it — I can't sleep.

symptom_narrative.duration: around 48 hours, much worse in the last 12
symptom_narrative.character: sharp and throbbing, ear feels blocked
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe, worst it's been, stopping me sleeping
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, was on and off at first
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving my jaw or touching the outside of the ear
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick yellowish discharge coming out, and it feels like I can't hear as well on that side
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sleep because of the pain

objective_data_offered.value: thick yellowish discharge I can see on the cotton bud
feels muffled / reduced hearing on the right
